title: Caldarax Ceiling Pendant Light Fitting, B22 Lamp Holder, 6”(150mm), Black Plastic Light Bulb Holder, Ceiling Rose for Kitchen Island Living Room Bedroom Dinning Room Lightings
features: 【Pendant Light Fitting】1pc * Black B22 Plastic chandelier holder, applicable voltage AC 220V-240V. You can create a variety of decorative chandeliers by adding vintage bulbs and it can add a beautiful vintage feel to your home. Shade not included, bulb not included.
【High Quality】Black ceiling pendant light fittings, smooth surface, high gloss, anti-scratch and anti-fade.

【Length】The chandelier fitting Cable length is 6 inches (150mm), Overall length 245mm, you can easily install the chandelier to meet your room lighting needs. It can be used as a pendant light or a bedroom accessories.

【Easy to Install】B22 snap-on holder for quick and easy installation, ideal for living room, dining room, kitchen and other living areas. Easily installation to light your own room and make's your lighting accessories more elegant.

【Wide Application】The pendant light accessory kit is perfect for bedrooms, kitchens, bathrooms, hallway lights and ceiling lights. Fits open bulb styles and is perfect for making your own lampshade designs.
【Service】CE certification. If there is any quality problem within 1 year, the product will be refunded and replaced. If you have any quality problem, please feel free to contact us to solve it.
description: Product Description Specifications: - Type: B22 Chandelier Lamp Holder - Cable length: 150mm - Overall length: 245mm - Voltage: AC 220V-240V - Material: PC - Current: 6A Warm Reminder: Please check the size and lamp holder is suitable for your device before purchasing, Thanks. Fits open bulb styles and is perfect for making your own lampshade designs. Length The chandelier fitting Cable length is 6 inches (150mm), Overall length 245mm, you can easily install the chandelier to meet your room lighting needs. B22 Base B22 snap-on lamp holder for quick and easy installation, ideal for living room, dining room, kitchen and other living areas. Black Plastic ceiling fitting, applicable voltage AC 220V-240V, you can freely install your light bulbs. Application The pendant light accessory kit is perfect for bedrooms, kitchens, bathrooms, hallway lights and ceiling lights.
